block_00: We end support for devices with iOS 9.x versions
block_01: End of support for devices with iOS 9.x versions
block_03: Starting from October 2020, we end support of the IQ Option iOS application running on Apple devices with iOS versions lower than 10.x due to technical reasons beyond our control.
block_04: In order to keep using your trading application, please update to iOS version 10.x (or higher) before October, 2020.
block_05: Below you can find the list of Apple devices that are compatible with iOS 10:
block_07: iPad 4th generation, iPad mini 2 and later;
